case_title: THE HASSELL LAW GROUP, A P.C. et al VS. USCB INC. et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF, ATTORNEY DAWN L. HASSELL IN RESPONSE TO DEFENDANT HOSPITAL & CLINICS' SECOND LETTER TO THE JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, DATED 8/29/2013. FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE HASSELL LAW GROUP, A P.C.
NOTICE OF CHALLENGE TO VENUE MAILED TO ALL PARTIES.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 110.00 SERVED AUG-23-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT STANFORD HOSPITAL & CLINICS

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, PER PLAINTIFFS. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS (2), ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CORRESPONDENCE RE: $5,000 LIMIT FOR BUSINESS FILED BY DEFENDANT STANFORD HOSPITAL & CLINICS
